statistical_anchor: Price at $707.1 sits 20.4% below the 50-day MA ($888.78) and at the 0.05 extreme of its recent range following a -11.74% 5-day drawdown; today's +2.51% gain lacks conviction with volume at only 0.44x the 30-day average, signaling mean-reversion noise rather than trend reversal.
volume_assessment: Low conviction (0.44x average). The daily price advance is unsupported by institutional flow, making the move statistically likely to be transient tape noise rather than a sustainable accumulation phase.
trend_assessment: Short-term momentum is decisively down (-3.3% over 3 days, -11.74% over 5 days). Price has collapsed below the 50-day MA and is at the absolute bottom of its recent range (position 0.05). Momentum is exhausted on the downside with no reversal confirmation.
regime_context: VIX at ~16.9 indicates a normal volatility regime where technical breakdowns in individual names are not masked by systemic fear. In this environment, stocks trading significantly below their MA50 without volume support typically continue to drift lower or consolidate until structural support is tested.
watch_items: Volume expanding above 1.5x the 30-day average on a daily close above $725
Price reclaiming and holding above the 50-day MA ($888.78)
